description: F6 example density detector patterns. From factor-rubrics.md.

detectors.name: fenced_code_block
detectors.description: Fenced code blocks containing sample code

detectors.name: inline_code_usage
detectors.description: Inline code references showing correct usage
detectors.note: Only count when showing concrete usage, not just naming a thing

detectors.name: explicit_example
detectors.description: Explicit 'Example:' or 'e.g.,' followed by a concrete case

detectors.name: file_path_reference
detectors.description: File path references showing concrete locations

detectors.name: before_after_comparison
detectors.description: Before/after comparisons with concrete values on both sides
detectors.note: Only counts when both sides have concrete values (e.g., 'Use X not Y')

scoring_note: Interpolate between table entries. Counts >= 2.5 score 0.90.
